name: settlemesh-skills
description: Deploy + monetize skills wrapping the SettleMesh CLI and MCP server — ship a live app, charge end users, call metered paid APIs, publish a paid API, schedule jobs, and rent out a logged-in agent.

plugins.name: ship-paid-app
plugins.description: Deploy a full-stack app to a live *.run.settlemesh.io URL in one command — login, managed DB, and billing wired automatically.

plugins.name: charge-my-users
plugins.description: Turn a deployed app into a product that bills its own end users per use (end-user-pays via X-Settle-Payer), with your markup.

plugins.name: metered-data-fetch
plugins.description: Call paid web search / scrape / SEO / finance data per-call with a cost quote up front and no BYOK — first call to each capability is free.

plugins.name: paid-waitlist-page
plugins.description: Spin up a hosted waitlist / landing / pre-order page that persists signups to a managed database and can take a payment.

plugins.name: media-studio-metered
plugins.description: Generate images / video / audio through a metered pipeline you can resell per render — no BYOK, first call free.

plugins.name: sell-live-dataset
plugins.description: Turn a scrape, dataset, or any endpoint into a priced API that other agents and people pay per call.

plugins.name: agent-cron-service
plugins.description: Run a hosted agent on a cron schedule with exactly-once idempotent billing and per-day spend caps.

plugins.name: rent-a-logged-in-agent
plugins.description: Lend a logged-in claude-code / codex agent into a fail-closed sandbox for pay, gated to an allowlist or your friend graph.
